title: Breadth broad, tech lags — a quiet day near highs
tag: SPY closing near its 52-week high on falling volatility; small caps and value led, tech lagged.

spy.read: Closed near the 52-week high; broad, unremarkable strength

qqq.read: Lagged the tape — mega-cap tech gave a little back

sentiment.label: UPBEAT
sentiment.qualifier: broad participation outside tech, volatility fell sharply

weather.volatility: VIX 15.67, down 5.03% on the day — quiet, no fear premium showing
weather.tone: Calm and broad — a day to hold discipline, not chase the small-cap pop

cluster: Leadership lane: DIA and IWM led; QQQ lagged — value and small-cap over mega-cap tech today
Key catalyst today: Morgan Stanley, BlackRock, Johnson & Johnson, Elevance Health, and Cintas all reported Q2 earnings this morning
Secondary catalyst: Netflix, UnitedHealth, and GE Aerospace report tomorrow (7/16) — worth watching into the close
Small cap vs large cap: IWM (+0.43%) outpaced both SPY and QQQ — small caps leading
Broad participation: positive across SPY, DIA, IWM — only QQQ was negative, breadth looks healthy
Rotation note: mild rotation away from mega-cap tech into value and small-cap names
Behavior rule: don't chase today's small-cap pop, and don't read one lagging day in QQQ as a reversal
account: Mission for today: observe — breadth is healthy, but nothing aligned enough yet to add risk
Broker status: IB sandbox scoped, not yet connected; Schwab pending
Elevated event risk: Netflix, UnitedHealth, and GE Aerospace report tomorrow morning — carries into tomorrow's open
checklist: Data flow, broker connections, overnight positions, stop logic: monitoring data-only — no live broker connection yet
Core universe glance: SPY, DIA, IWM clear; QQQ cloudy (lagging)
Day-specific catalyst note #1: big bank and healthcare Q2 earnings reported this morning (MS, BLK, JNJ, ELV, CTAS)
Day-specific catalyst note #2: Netflix, UnitedHealth, GE Aerospace report tomorrow — watch the open
body_muted: No new action required today. Hold discipline, let the tape show its hand before adding risk.
